detectors.description:
Reentrancy in LockToken.release() (LockToken.sol#197-213):
	External calls:
	- token_amount = tokenBalance() (LockToken.sol#205)
		- token_reward.balanceOf(this) (LockToken.sol#165)
	- token_reward.transfer(beneficiary,token_amount) (LockToken.sol#207)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- isReleased = true (LockToken.sol#211)
	LockToken.isReleased (LockToken.sol#141) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- LockToken.isReleased (LockToken.sol#141)
	- LockToken.release() (LockToken.sol#197-213)

	- [LockToken.release()](LockToken.sol#L197-L213)
